name: Pat's Potato Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the chopped onion in a pot and add 1/4 cup of water. Cook over low heat for 25 minutes.
2. Add the remaining ingredients: celery stalks, potatoes, carrots, cabbage, kale, additional water, garlic, salt, and paprika.
3. Stir everything together and cook for an additional 30 minutes until all vegetables are tender.
Per serving: 184 cal, 6 g prot, 38 g carb, .5 g fat (3%)
From Vegetarian Voice Vol 19 No 4
